title: Zeqeey Heavy Duty Strimmer Cord 2.4mm 0.095" x 86m 282ft Nylon Grass Trimmer Line with Indentation Embossed Weed Trimming String Wire
features: Versatile Application: This universal trimmer cutting line features a standard diameter of 2.4 mm (0.095 in) and a length of 86 m (282 ft), enabling efficient handling of light, medium, and heavy-duty trimming tasks. The enhanced nylon material adapts to various grass types and terrains, making it an ideal weed trimming cord for diverse outdoor maintenance needs.

Wide Compatibility: Designed as a replacement spool for both petrol and electric trimmers, this grass trimming line minimizes waste and ensures seamless integration. Users are advised to consult their equipment manual to confirm compatibility, ensuring the correct diameter matches their trimmer for smooth installation.

Durable Structure: Crafted from tightly nylon with indentation on the surface, this strimmer cord offers decent strength and breakage resistance. Its vibrant color ensures high visibility during lawn care, allowing users to easily track trimming progress and maintain precision

Tangle-Free Convenience: Part of the lawn care series, this grass trimmer wire comes pre-wound on a portable spool for easy, knot-free unwinding. Customize the length as needed and enjoy a clutter-free storage solution. Its compact design ensures portability and space-efficient organization, making it a practical choice for gardener.

Precision Cutting Design: The embossed surface of the circular profile maintains a stable and even cutting edge during high-speed rotation, delivering sharp, clean cuts that weeds. This professional grass trimming string maintains consistent performance even in dense vegetation, ensuring efficient yard maintenance.
